resume.done_when: No console.log calls left in src/.
resume.resume_by: Clean up the leftover console.log statements in src/utils/logger.ts.
resume.prompt: run python3 scripts/handoff-render.py --file .claude/handoffs/HANDOFF.json and continue. next acceptance check: grep -rn console.log src/ returns no production matches.

state.next_acceptance_check: grep -rn console.log src/ returns no production matches.
